name: magic-words
description: Word Wizard for kids — turns a single word (English or Chinese) into a picture, a silly magic formula, a memory spell, and a tiny challenge, output as two parallel kid-native cards (Chinese + English). Accepts either-language input, finds the truest cross-language equivalent, and auto-scales tone for ages ~4–12. Inspired by lijigang's original 'Word Soul Master' (单词灵魂解剖师).
